parameters.query:
SELECT t.*, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - t.started_at)) / 3600 AS hours_running
FROM ab_tests t
WHERE t.status = 'running'
ORDER BY t.started_at DESC
LIMIT 5;

SELECT param5 AS ad_id, COUNT(*) AS total_leads,
       SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'Depositor' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS depositors,
       ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'Depositor' THEN cost ELSE 0 END), 2) AS crm_revenue
FROM leads
WHERE param5 IS NOT NULL AND param5 != '' AND param5 REGEXP '^[0-9]+$'
  AND created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY)
GROUP BY param5

-- Mark test completed with winner
UPDATE ab_tests SET
  status = 'completed',
  winner_ad_id = {{ $json.winner.ad_id }},
  finished_at = NOW()
WHERE id = {{ $json.test_id }};

-- Mark winner teaser as 'scaling' (gradual rollout, NOT immediate bid bump)
UPDATE teasers SET
  state = 'scaling',
  state_changed_at = NOW(),
  state_reason = 'A/B test winner, gradual rollout phase',
  updated_at = NOW()
WHERE ad_id = {{ $json.winner.ad_id }};

-- Mark losers as stopped
UPDATE teasers SET
  state = 'stopped',
  state_changed_at = NOW(),
  state_reason = 'A/B test loser',
  updated_at = NOW()
WHERE ad_id IN ({{ $json.losers.join(',') || '0' }});

-- Log state transitions
INSERT INTO teaser_state_log (ad_id, old_state, new_state, reason, triggered_by)
VALUES (
  {{ $json.winner.ad_id }},
  'testing',
  'scaling',
  'A/B test winner ({{ $json.significance || "no significance data" }})',
  'ab_tester'
);
